nodes.name: eowc_over_window.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the end-of-watermark-clock (EOWC) over-window streaming executor, verifying correct window result emission at watermark boundaries.

nodes.name: hash_agg.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the streaming HashAgg executor, verifying aggregate correctness for insert, update, and delete change messages.

nodes.name: hop_window.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the HopWindow streaming executor, verifying sliding window output for various hop sizes and event time distributions.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point for stream integration tests; assembles all test modules (eowc_over_window, hash_agg, hop_window, etc.) into a single test binary.

nodes.name: materialized_exprs.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests verifying that materialized expression columns in streaming projections produce correct incremental results on insert/update/delete.

nodes.name: over_window.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the streaming OverWindow executor with ROWS and RANGE frame semantics, verifying window aggregate results on incremental data.

nodes.name: project_set.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests for the streaming ProjectSet executor, verifying that set-returning table functions produce correct streaming output.

nodes.name: snapshot.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests verifying streaming executor snapshot and restore semantics, ensuring that state is correctly serialized and restored across epoch boundaries.
